Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Complexity.description: The enum defining the complexity of the application.

values.name: Low
values.description: The application is simple, with minimal dependencies and straightforward functionality.

values.name: Medium
values.description: The application has moderate interdependencies and requires some coordination between components.

values.name: High
values.description: The application is intricate, with multiple interdependent components and complex interactions.
